prompt: 同步状态: US-005 状态已更新为 Done，将此状态同步到 UPM requirements 章节对应条目

assertions.name: updates_upm_status
assertions.description: Should update UPM requirements entry status to Done

assertions.name: identifies_changed_entry
assertions.description: Should identify the specific UPM entry that was changed

assertions.name: records_previous_status
assertions.description: Should record the previous status (In Progress) for audit trail
